registerLayout.R8: Int - timeout height (block number, ~100 blocks from bet)
registerLayout.R10: Int - pre-committed reveal height (earliest block house can reveal, ~70 blocks from bet)

spendingPaths.reveal: houseProp && commitmentOk && HEIGHT >= rngBlockHeight && HEIGHT <= timeoutHeight && correct_payout

securityNotes: R10 reveal window limits house block-grinding to 30 blocks
Player secret (R9) visible on-chain — honest house assumption
Only house can reveal — player must wait for timeout if offline
blake2b256 is Ergo's native hash — no SHA-256 on-chain

v2.issue: No R10 reveal window — house could grind blocks until timeout
